Perfect! Now I understand the full issue:

1. `changes` can be either an aggregated stats object `{files, insertions, deletions}` OR an array of per-file changes `IChatSessionFileChange[]`
2. Cloud sessions provide `changes` as an array of `IChatSessionFileChange[]` (multi-diff) 
3. The code on line 505 checks `if (!(session.changes instanceof Array))` - meaning it ONLY processes non-array changes
4. So when cloud sessions provide an array of changes, they are not aggregated into a single stats
